positives: Exceptional sound quality with rich midrange and detailed highs
Low noise floor providing a black background for music
Effective vibration and resonance control for pristine clarity
negatives: High price point may be prohibitive for some buyers
Limited availability in physical retail stores
Potentially complex setup process for beginners

positives: Affordable entry-level turntable from Oracle Audio
Adjustable unipivot tonearm with effective mass tuning
Customizable color inserts and optional LED lighting module
negatives: Lead time of 1-2 weeks due to custom nature
Limited availability in major Canadian retailers

purchase_paths.canonical_product_name: Obi3 Bluetooth Turntable with Phono Pre-Amp
positives: Built-in phono preamp for direct RCA connection
negatives: Some users report uneven platter rotation
No dedicated power button; requires unplugging to turn off

canadian_brands.notes: Fluance is a Canadian audio technology company headquartered in Niagara Falls, Ontario. It designs and manufactures high-fidelity turntables, powered speakers, and home audio loudspeakers.
Pure Fidelity is a Canadian-founded brand handcrafting its hybrid turntables in its Vancouver workshop.
Oracle Audio is based in Quebec and designs, crafts, and assembles its Origine series turntables in its Canadian factory.
Kronos Audio Products, headquartered in Montreal, handcrafts its high-end suspended turntables in Canada.

canadian_brands.top_product: Obi3 Bluetooth Turntable with Phono Pre-Amp
canadian_brands.notes: Kanto Audio is a Canadian company based in Coquitlam, British Columbia, offering the Obi3 Bluetooth turntable, although its manufacturing is overseas.
